results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Grassmannian subspace tracking + rank-1 geodesic updates + orthonormality preservation IS the K-subspace ring-rotation gradient traversal mechanism.
Continual low-rank projection with orthogonal subspaces covers K-subspace orthogonal traversal mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Criterion quantifying displacement + efficient transitions between low-rank subspaces IS the K-subspace ring-step rotation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Orthogonal gradient projection for safety alignment + plasticity-stability balance IS the alignment-direction preservation + subspace constraint mechanism.
GrassWalk + GrassJump randomized subspace geometry exploration covers K-subspace random/CCW traversal mechanism.
Safety-sensitive subspace + harmful-resistant null + safety-relevant decomposition covers alignment-anchor preservation mechanism.
Full-rank training under low-rank constraint via gradient subspace covers radius-constrained subspace traversal.
Low-rank gradient subspace stabilization + low-rank weights covers spiral-inward annealed-radius mechanism.
